expectations.text: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
expectations.evidence: Single dashboard.html with Chart.js CDN only.

expectations.text: Includes at least one KPI card showing a progress/completion percentage from the source data
expectations.evidence: KPI cards for Overall Project Progress (45%) and AI Chatbot Completion (65%) rendered as ring gauges, per agent report.

expectations.text: Includes a progress bar element for at least one completion percentage
expectations.evidence: Output contains 4 occurrences of bar-track/bar-fill classes (linear progress bars) plus 4 SVG ring gauges, covering team utilization and completion metrics.

expectations.text: Includes a risk table listing the 3 risks from the source sheet with a status indicator per row (At Risk / Watching / On Track)
expectations.evidence: Risks & Issues table with 3 rows (vendor SLA, headcount backfill, security review), color-coded status pills per agent report; at_risk/watching/on_track text all present in file.

expectations.text: All numeric values in the output (budget figures, percentages) match values derivable from the source workbook, not invented numbers
expectations.evidence: Budget Spent ($123,750) and Remaining ($151,250) match source rows exactly.

expectations.text: Includes some visualization (chart or bar) of team utilization across the 3 teams
expectations.evidence: Team Utilization panel with horizontal progress bars (AI 90%, IT 68%, Support 35%) plus a Chart.js bar chart, per agent report.
